category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a fast and sensitive gapped read aligner.
display_name_sources: Official Bowtie 2 homepage and manual use the display name Bowtie 2; source_facts.name is bowtie2.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Bowtie 2 site; official manual page is dedicated documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/BenLangmead/bowtie2; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies read alignment; source_facts.executables lists bowtie2 alignment, build, and inspect tools.
